correspondingSource.label: FFmpeg 8.0.1 official release source
correspondingSource.staticBinaryNote: The bundled macOS ffmpeg binary is statically linked. Complete corresponding source for GPLv3 components in that binary includes FFmpeg and the libraries listed in binaryProvenance.darwin.staticLinkedComponents. Rebuild instructions: https://github.com/shaka-project/static-ffmpeg-binaries

usageInAvaNevis: ffmpeg is invoked as a separate subprocess for Opus compression after recording. AvaNevis application source remains MIT-licensed.
releaseDistribution: GitHub Releases for this project attach ffmpeg-8.0.1.tar.xz alongside installers. Installers also ship THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md under resources/legal/.
